briefdescription.para: This function does a minimal test on the I2S receiver device and driver as a design example.

detaileddescription.para: The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the XI2s_Rx component. It initializes a I2S receiver and then sets it up such that a periodic interrupt is generated.
This function uses interrupt driven mode of the I2S receiver.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Interrupt Controller driver Instance
is a pointer to the XI2s_Rx driver Instance
is the XPAR_<i2s_rx_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the Test is successful, otherwise XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the I2S receiver.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context when the I2S receiver receives a AES Block Complete Interrupt.
This handler provides an example of how to handle I2S receiver interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the I2S receiver.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context when the I2S receiver receives a Underflow Interrupt.
This handler provides an example of how to handle I2S receiver interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the main function of the I2S receiver example using Interrupts.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS to indicate success, else XST_FAILURE to indicate a Failure.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a example for using the I2S receiver hardware device and I2S receiver driver using interrupt mode.This example assumes that the interrupt controller is also present as a part of the system.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kar 01/25/18 First release
